title: Most Popular Destinations
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM MissionAccepted WHERE PassengerMission = 1 AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT DestinationSystem AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM MissionAccepted WHERE PassengerMission = 1 AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY DestinationSystem ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

details.text: {total} passenger mission(s) accepted during the report period. The destination breakdown reveals the economic and political hot spots attracting the galaxy's travellers — conflict zones, tourist beacons, and permit-locked systems each draw distinct passenger types with very different risk profiles.
details.help: MissionAccepted DestinationSystem for passenger missions. total drives the title as the accepted mission volume.

tagLines: Passenger destination frequency analysis compiled. Most requested systems noted in the transport log.
Certain systems attract a certain kind of traveller. Your most popular destinations reveal what kind.
The route shapes the clientele. Where people are going tells you as much as who they are.
